campaign.goal: Recruit strong AI and software talent for portfolio opportunities.
campaign.topic: AI startup opportunities and career exploration
campaign.value_proposition: high-context introductions to startups where candidate background maps to real needs

preferred.label: Schedule meeting
preferred.description: Prospect agrees to a call and shares scheduling details.

banned_phrases: I'd love to pick your brain

style_examples.reply: Hey your experience in this startup seems cool, can I join your network?
style_examples.label: cold opener

style_examples.reply: I am working with many founders and VC firms, love to help startup to grow
style_examples.label: what we do reply
style_examples.incoming: What do you do? / What kind of opportunities are these?

style_examples.reply: Great, let's schedule a time to discuss what interest you the most.
style_examples.label: career follow-up
style_examples.incoming: Yeah I'm open to chatting — I've been at Acme for a few years working on infra.

style_examples.reply: Let meet next week, can you share your email?
style_examples.label: next steps
style_examples.incoming: Sounds interesting — what would the next step look like?

style_examples.reply: Sure, let me know if you change your mind.
style_examples.label: lukewarm reply
style_examples.incoming: Maybe later — pretty slammed right now.

style_examples.reply: Sounds good, let's schedule a call next week!
style_examples.label: resume or call ask
style_examples.incoming: Yeah I'd be curious to hear more about what's out there.
